title: Convention Tiffany Grant comes to Kitsune 2014
display_title: Convention Tiffany Grant comes to Kitsune 2014
wikitext:
[]: [Convention] Tiffany Grant comes to Kitsune 2014             Quote Post by Dataprime » Wed Jan 01, 2014 6:11 pm March 21-23 @ the Radisson Hotel in Appleton, WI [url]www.kitsunekon.com[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Wed Jan 01, 2014 9:00 pm I'm not going to be there, but I expect somebody to get a picture of themselves with Tiffany Grant.

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Wed Jan 01, 2014 9:39 pm I did that at Saboten last year. Grant is shorter than you think, ~5'4. I'm sure she'll be bringing her store to sell stuff that she'll sign.

[]:             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Thu Jan 02, 2014 9:46 am Yeah she's a tiny little library lady ...actually come to think of it she kinda reminds me of a younger version of the log lady from Twin Peaks . Asuka is her log. Uh, anyway somebody pressure her for Miyamura and/or Gainax Tales.

[]:             Quote Post by MisatoRitsukoFan » Fri Feb 07, 2014 8:17 pm AR-99 wrote: I did that at Saboten last year. Grant is shorter than you think, ~5'4. I'm sure she'll be bringing her store to sell stuff that she'll sign.

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Sat Feb 08, 2014 7:08 pm Tiff never comes to the UK. Our conventions haven't got the money. It makes me sad. If anyone from here is going, say Hi from everyone here

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Sat Feb 08, 2014 9:03 pm MisatoRitsukoFan wrote: She has a store?
